description.description: Description of the task that will be created from this template.
description.example: Please describe the bug you found and how to reproduce it.

html_description.description: HTML description of the task that will be created from this template.
html_description.example: Please describe the bug you found and how to reproduce it.

memberships.description: Array of projects that the task created from this template will be added to

relative_start_on.description: The number of days after the task has been instantiated on which that the task will start

relative_due_on.description: The number of days after the task has been instantiated on which that the task will be due

due_time.description: The time of day that the task will be due

dependencies.description: Array of task templates that the task created from this template will depend on

dependents.description: Array of task templates that will depend on the task created from this template

followers.description: Array of users that will be added as followers to the task created from this template

attachments.description: Array of attachments that will be added to the task created from this template

subtasks.description: Array of subtasks that will be added to the task created from this template

custom_fields.description: Array of custom fields that will be added to the task created from this template
